no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw Tailwind palette colors are not allowed in className. Use semantic tokens (primary, surface, on-surface, etc.) defined in tailwind.config.ts.
Hex arbitrary values (bg-[#xxx]) are not allowed in className. Register the color in tailwind.config.ts or as a CSS variable in globals.css.
Inline hex colors in style prop are not allowed. Use Tailwind classes with semantic tokens, or extract the value to a CSS variable / file-level constant (for third-party lib props like recharts).
